name: Universal Store Holdings Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$7.0300, stop A$5.9994, target A$7.7900 (0.74:1) — then trail it.
